title: 5 Investors Betting Big on FOX Stock Amidst Tucker Carlson Firing
text: This week brought a news story that shocked the audience of one particular news network. Fox News dismissed Tucker Carlson.

title: Fox stock: who will replace Tucker Carlson at Fox News?
text: The Fox Corporation (NASDAQ: FOX) stock price has been under pressure as investors come to terms with the abrupt firing of Tucker Carlson. The shares plunged to a low of $29.12, the lowest level since January.

title: Fox News Wins Prime Time Ratings On First Night Without Tucker Carlson
text: In the key demo of adults 25-54, the highest rated show in cable news Monday night was MSNBC's The Rachel Maddow Show.

title: Why was Tucker Carlson fired and what was he worth to Fox Corp?
text: Fox Corp (NASDAQ: FOX) remains in focus a day after firing its top-rated primetime host – Tucker Carlson as Invezz reported HERE. Why did Fox Corp part ways with Tucker Carlson?

title: Fox stock price outlook after Tucker Carlson exit: buy or sell?
text: The Fox (NASDAQ: FOX) stock price plunged hard on Monday after the company decided to part way with Tucker Carlson, the controversial host. The shares retreated to a low of $29.29, the lowest level since January.

title: Carlson out at Fox! Lemon out at CNN!
text: In one of the most tumultuous days to hit the cable news business in years, Fox News is cutting ties with its top-rated host, Tucker Carlson, and CNN has parted ways with long-time anchor Don Lemon.

title: Why Is FOX Stock Down Today?
text: Fox (NASDAQ: FOX ) is making headlines today after it cut ties with Tucker Carlson, one of its most popular but controversial hosts. Shares of FOX stock initially fell about 5% on the news, which broke around 11:30 a.m.

title: Tucker Carlson out at Fox News after $787M Dominion defamation settlement; News Corp shares fall
text: News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS) shares took a brief tumble Monday afternoon after Fox News Media announced that Tucker Carlson would be parting ways with the company.  Carlson is Fox New's most-watched anchor, with this 8 pm time slot drawing an average of 3.25 million viewers in the first quarter of 2023.

title: What was Tucker Carlson worth to Fox News? About $650 million, according to Wall Street.

title: Tucker Carlson's Exit Wipes Out $700 Million In Market Value For Fox
text: It's the latest headwind for the cable giant after it agreed to pay nearly $800 million to settle a defamation lawsuit for its coverage of fraud during the 2020 election.

title: Fox Stock Tumbles as Tucker Carlson to Leave Fox News
text: Fox Corp. stock was falling Monday after the media giant announced primetime television host Tucker Carlson was leaving the station.

title: Fox: Not Too Late To Dump It
text: Fox: Not Too Late To Dump It.

title: Fox Settles Dominion Suit, but Smartmatic Case and Others Loom
text: Another election technology company, Smartmatic, is suing news outlets, including Fox, over false claims of election fraud, and Dominion has other cases pending.

title: Why Fox News' Next Defamation Suit—From Smartmatic—Might Require Another ‘Big Check' To Settle
text: After Dominion accepted a settlement offer, Smartmatic is moving forward with a $2.7 billion lawsuit against Fox News, its anchors and Rudy Giuliani.

title: Fox Will Pay $787.5 Million to Settle Dominion Defamation Suit
text: The settlement with Dominion Voting Systems was the latest extraordinary twist in a case that exposed the inner workings of the most powerful voice in conservative news.

title: Dominion defamation lawsuit against Fox News delayed
text: Dominion Voting Systems' $1.6 billion defamation lawsuit against Fox News has been delayed on the eve of its scheduled start date, an official for the court hearing the case said.

title: Fox News apologizes to judge in defamation case for failing to disclose Rupert Murdoch's role at the network
text: Fox News apologizes to judge in defamation case for failing to disclose Rupert Murdoch's role at the network

title: What Dominion's lawsuit could mean for Fox and its cable TV networks
text: Dominion Voting System's defamation lawsuit against Fox Corp. and its cable TV networks will go to trial on Monday.
